name: Ubiquiti UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cable 1m
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cable 1m
short_description: Enhance the aesthetics of your network infrastructure with the UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cable, a slim patch cable designed to showcase the effects of Etherlighting™ when connected to Pro Max switches. This innovative cable features a translucent RJ45 connector that allows Etherlighting™ to glow, adding vibrancy to your network infrastructure. The translucent boot on the RJ45 connector optimizes the Etherlighting™ brightness, ensuring that the captivating light shines through without compromising the cable's durability or functionality.
description: Buy Ubiquiti UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cable 1m. Price from 9.45 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option. ☎ +371 60 000 888.

detailed_description.heading: Stylish Lighting
detailed_description.text: Enhance the aesthetics of your network infrastructure with the UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cable, a slim patch cable designed to showcase the effects of Etherlighting™ when connected to Pro Max switches. This innovative cable features a translucent RJ45 connector that allows Etherlighting™ to glow, adding vibrancy to your network infrastructure. The translucent boot on the RJ45 connector optimizes the Etherlighting™ brightness, ensuring that the captivating light shines through without compromising the cable's durability or functionality.

detailed_description.heading: Unleash Network Performance
detailed_description.text: Beyond its visual appeal, the UACC-Cable-Patch-EL delivers exceptional performance for modern network demands. With support for 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet, this cable ensures efficient data transfer for bandwidth-intensive applications. High-quality Category 6 cabling guarantees reliable signal transmission and supports the latest PoE++ standards. This allows compatible Ubiquiti devices to draw power directly through the cable, eliminating the need for separate power adapters and simplifying installation. With an incredibly slim outer diameter of 2.5mm, this patch cable is barely noticeable, ensuring discreet and flexible cable management within tight spaces, maintaining a clean and organized network setup.
